name: Lo Mein with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until tender but still firm; about 2-3 minutes.
2. Drain the noodles and rinse under cold running water, then drain again.
3. Toss the noodles with sesame oil until well coated.
4. In a small bowl, combine oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and pepper.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
6. Add ginger and garlic, stir-fry for 10 seconds.
7. Add shrimp, stir-fry until pink, about 1 minute.
8. Add sherry and chives, stir-fry until chives begin to wilt, about 15 seconds.
9. Add half of the bean sprouts, stir-fry for 15 seconds.
10. Add remaining bean sprouts, stir-fry for another 15 seconds.
11. Add oyster sauce mixture and noodles; cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
